description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�NEW (Posted: June 24, 2026)

Water Tank Replacement Work at Hanno City Comprehensive Welfare Center — Please Use City Hall Parking

We will be carrying out water tank replacement work at the Hanno City Comprehensive Welfare Center.

During the periods affected by this construction, the parking lot at the Comprehensive Welfare Center will be unavailable. Please use the City Hall parking lot instead.

Construction Schedule (Planned)

【Phase 1】
June 22, 2026 (Monday) – July 25, 2026 (Saturday)

【Phase 2】
August 31, 2026 (Monday) – October 17, 2026 (Saturday)

Note: The construction schedule may shift depending on progress. Thank you for your understanding.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/chiikifukushika/13654.html
summary: ℹ️ Parking at Hanno City Comprehensive Welfare Center parking lot will be unavailable due to water tank replacement work. Please use City Hall parking instead.
